title: Chest Lock
description: Empower players to secure their chests, manage access rights, and easy automatic chest sorting
body:
# Chestlock
Lock Your Chests. Keep Your Loot Safe!  Minecraft 1.21.10

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

DISCORD: https://discord.gg/BGurTEm2nj


Chestlock is a fun and powerful plugin that keeps your chests and containers safe! ️ Once you lock something, it belongs to YOU. Other players can’t steal from it, break it, blow it up, or trick it with hoppers.

Perfect for survival servers , SMP worlds ️, factions-lite ⚔️, or anywhere players need to protect their hard-earned loot!


━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

✨ What Chestlock Does ✨


✅ Other players can’t open your locked chest  
✅ Other players can’t break your locked chest ⛏️❌ 
✅ Hoppers and hopper minecarts can’t steal items  
✅ TNT and creepers won’t destroy your chest ❌ 
✅ Mobs and the environment can’t mess with it ‍♂️❌ 

Only YOU (and the players YOU choose) can use your locked containers!



 Works with:
Chests (single & double), barrels, furnaces, smokers, blast furnaces, hoppers, droppers, dispensers, jukeboxes, shulker boxes, and more!

If it holds items — Chestlock can protect it! ️


━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Why Chestlock Exists


Chestlock was made because players were tired of:
• Getting robbed by hoppers  
• Losing loot to creeper explosions  
• Having people “accidentally” break their chests  
• Trusting the wrong player  

Chestlock fixes all of that with simple, strong protection!


━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Commands


All commands start with /chestlock ⌨️ 
Most commands have a [toggle] mode so you can lock multiple chests easily! ⚡


Basic Lock Commands

/chestlock add <player> [toggle] 
Let a player use your chest

 /chestlock remove <player> [toggle] 
Take away someone’s access ❌

 /chestlock claim [toggle] 
Lock a chest and make it yours

 /chestlock destroy [toggle] 
Completely remove a lock

 /chestlock public [toggle] 
Make a locked chest usable by everyone (still hopper & explosion safe)

 /chestlock bypass 
Admin-only command that ignores locks


━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Group System (Share With Teams & Friends!)


Groups let you share access with multiple players at once — perfect for bases, teams, and families! ❤️


Group Commands

/chestlock group create <name> 
Create a new group ✨

 /chestlock group delete <name> 
Delete your group ️

 /chestlock group add <group> <player> 
Add a player to your group ➕

 /chestlock group remove <group> <player> 
Remove a player from your group ➖

 /chestlock group leave <group> 
Leave a group

 /chestlock group list 
See all your groups and members



Once a group is on a chest, everyone in that group can use it!


━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

⚙️ Permissions

Player Permissions

• chestlock.claim 
• chestlock.add 
• chestlock.remove 
• chestlock.public 
• chestlock.destroy 
• chestlock.group.create 
• chestlock.group.add 
• chestlock.group.remove 
• chestlock.group.leave 
• chestlock.group.list


Admin Permissions

• chestlock.bypass 
• chestlock.bypass.* 
• chestlock.updatechecker


━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

️ Extra Protection Details


Opening Protection 
Only the owner and allowed players can open it.

⛏️ Breaking Protection 
No one else can break it.

Explosion Protection 
Creepers, TNT, ghasts — nothing can destroy it.

Hopper Protection 
No hopper tricks. No hopper minecart stealing. Ever.


━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

⚡ How to Install


1️⃣ Download the plugin 
2️⃣ Put it in your /plugins folder 
3️⃣ Restart the server  
4️⃣ Set up permissions ⚙️ 
5️⃣ Test it with a friend  

No databases. No setup headaches. Just protection!


━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

❓ FAQ ❓


Can admins open locked chests? 
Yes, if they have bypass permission

Can I share my chest with friends? 
Yes, using /chestlock add or groups

Do double chests work? 
Yes!

Can hoppers steal from locked chests? 
No. Ever.

Can explosions destroy locked chests? 
Nope ❌

Do I need another plugin? 
Nope! Chestlock works by itself ✅


━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

️ Tags

chestlock, chest protection, lock chest, anti theft, anti grief, hopper protection, secure storage, minecraft survival, chest security, storage protection
